assertions.assertion: An authorization policy requiring the 'catalog.read' scope is defined using RequireClaim
assertions.rationale: RequireClaim for scope-based policies is standard ASP.NET Core authorization

assertions.assertion: An authorization policy requiring the 'catalog.write' scope is defined using RequireClaim
The GET /products endpoint uses .RequireAuthorization() referencing the read policy
assertions.rationale: RequireAuthorization on minimal API endpoints is standard

assertions.assertion: The POST /products endpoint uses .RequireAuthorization() referencing the write policy
builder.Services.AddAuthorization is called to register the policies
